message:
Fix IssueUpdate::is_empty to account for expect_unassigned flag

The is_empty() method on IssueUpdate is used to detect no-op updates
that can be skipped. It was missing a check for the expect_unassigned
field, meaning an update that only set expect_unassigned=true would
incorrectly report itself as empty and be silently dropped.

Add `&& !self.expect_unassigned` to the conjunction so that toggling
the unassigned expectation flag is properly recognized as a meaningful
update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
